tools.name: faceCheckApi.postApiDeletePic
tools.description: Remove an image from a search request

tools.name: faceCheckApi.postApiInfo
tools.description: Returns remaining search credits, search engine online status, and number of indexed faces

tools.name: faceCheckApi.postApiSearch
tools.description: Submit a search request to the search engine and get back search results that contain URLs and all images in base64/webp format

tools.name: faceCheckApi.postApiUploadPic
tools.description: Upload 1 to 3 images as multipart/form-data, and get back a search request that contains id_search and 1 to 3 preview thumbnails

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
